title: Comedy Circus Ke Tansen
desc: Renowned personalities team up with talented stand-up comedians to put on hilarious performances, aiming to impress the judges.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti asks Saxena to tattoo a grape on his chest, but the sight of it causes Angoori to faint. Later, Tiwari worries about her health when she passes out again over real grapes.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan violently mugs Vibhuti, compelling him to self-harm under threat. Subsequently, when confronted by Angoori, Manmohan fabricates a story about his wicked twin, Jagmohan.

title: Sandwich
desc: Sher Singh has two wives, Nisha and Sweety, and juggles his time between them. However, when his two wives cross paths, his troubles increase manifold leading to hilarious situations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Angoori sends Manmohan to bathe. Later, Anita books movie tickets for herself and Vibhuti, but he refuses to go and runs out when it starts raining.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Kansa lashes out at Gandharv. Later, a worried Kanha ties his hand to Balaram's, hoping to keep him from going with Ghungroo alone.

title: Man Mohini
desc: A new couple, Ram and Sia, are experiencing some seriously creepy and unsettling things in their marriage. Is it just bad luck, or something more sinister?

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: An angry Vibhuti begins tearing all the pillows in his room; Vibhuti gets ready to meet Angoori but tells his wife that he is going to a friend's birthday party.
